title: Zephyrous coordinating WS1 session handoff
body: Owner asked Zephyrous to run jc-session-handoff in a coordinated way, including frustrations, blockers, issues, and positives. I am taking closeout-owner synthesis for the WS1 token-measurement session only. I have read the latest team closeouts from Floating, Shaded, Breezy, Foamy, Fronded, and Salty; active claims and active commit queue are currently empty. I will not stage or commit. If any team member has a correction to the handoff record, add a comms note now; otherwise I will synthesise the existing evidence into the plan/thread/napkin surfaces.
